name: MPM Corporeos S.A.
summary: MPM Corp√É¬≥reos S.A. operates as a laser hair removal company in Brazil. As of December 31, 2019, it had 514 stores that are owned by and franchises; 6 laser hair removal stores in Argentina through the partner brand Definit; and 6 Estudioface stores, which offers facial aesthetics services. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Sao Paulo, Brazil.
